::: {.callout-note}
## 受信機について / About the receiver

本手順は **Septentrio mosaic-G5** を対象としています。
This procedure targets the **Septentrio mosaic-G5** receiver.

<!--
  Central place for notes shared across languages and OSes.
  Include it from each qmd like this:

    {{< include ../_includes/receiver-note.qmd >}}

  TODO: add supported models, firmware requirements, and the two COM
        streams (raw / CON).
-->
:::
